candidate_requirements.requirement: Use a new secondary exit node, not SPB
candidate_requirements.acceptance: provider/region/account are documented and spb_fallback_allowed=false remains true in policy

candidate_requirements.requirement: Use a different provider and region from NL
candidate_requirements.acceptance: provider outage on NL should not imply outage on the secondary node

candidate_requirements.requirement: Keep secrets out of repo and reports
candidate_requirements.acceptance: only redacted profile shape or checksums are stored locally; no raw URI/private key/token
probe_secondary_exit.py can verify TCP reachability and expected exit IP without touching NL

candidate_requirements.requirement: Use a minimal daily/emergency profile split
candidate_requirements.acceptance: daily NL profile and emergency secondary profile are distinct; automatic switching remains disabled

activation_gates.gate: fresh read-only NL snapshot with blocking probes
activation_gates.pass_condition: snapshot is current and classifier says provider_ticket/failover or NL transport is critical while local client is healthy

activation_gates.gate: local client is not the failure domain
activation_gates.pass_condition: vpn_status shows local route/SOCKS/client are OK; otherwise fix local client first

activation_gates.gate: secondary node health is independently verified
activation_gates.pass_condition: probe_secondary_exit.py reports healthy, or endpoint_reachable_profile_unverified before the profile switch test
operator approves a manual client/profile switch; automatic failover remains false
selected emergency profile is not SPB and does not run sync_spb_standalone_clients.py

prepare_now: choose a new provider/region for a future secondary node
create safe probe config with nl-diagnostics/create_secondary_exit_config.py using public endpoint metadata only
prepare local-only health probe config from nl-diagnostics/manual-failover-secondary.example.json as a fallback template
document manual switch and rollback steps without storing secrets
during_incident: build current VPN decision report and provider packet if needed
perform client-side manual switch only after explicit approval
record timeline and keep NL unchanged while diagnosing provider/NL state
rollback: collect a fresh NL read-only snapshot showing transport healthy/advisory
switch the client back manually to NL daily profile
verify exit IP, route bypass, packet loss, and watchdog metrics
leave secondary profile available but inactive

blocked_actions: do not use SPB as fallback while SPB is disabled
do not run sync_spb_standalone_clients.py as recovery
do not change NL during failover unless a separate NL write approval exists
do not store raw VPN URIs, UUIDs, private keys, or bot tokens in reports
